levels.practice_prompt: On a submission, share one honest thing that could be better, phrased kindly. Write it down.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit one kind, honest piece of feedback.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they give honest feedback?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Was it phrased kindly?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Reflect back what made it kind.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Help me phrase one honest concern in a kind way.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I gave kind, honest feedback. Ask me if it was both kind and honest.
levels.next_step: Try kind honesty on a few more submissions.
levels.trust_signal: Completed first practice and submitted proof.
levels.safety_note: Kind honesty means caring about both the truth and the person.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: Harsh criticism, or avoiding the truth entirely, does not count.

levels.mastery_goal: Practice kind honesty several times.
levels.practice_prompt: Give kind, honest feedback on three submissions. Note each one.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit three pieces of kind, honest feedback.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they review different work?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Was each both honest and kind?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Point out the best balance.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Help me practice balancing honesty and kindness in feedback.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I gave kind, honest feedback three times. Ask me which balance felt right.
levels.next_step: Move toward explaining how to balance both.
levels.trust_signal: Showed repeated practice across different submissions.
levels.safety_note: Each piece of work and person deserves fresh care.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: Three sugar-coated comments with no real honesty do not count.

levels.mastery_goal: Explain how to be honest without being harsh.
levels.practice_prompt: Write 4-6 sentences on how you stay both honest and kind in feedback, with an example.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit a short explanation with an example.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they use a real example?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Could a beginner learn the balance?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Name the clearest point.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Ask me questions about how I keep honesty kind.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I explained kind honesty. Ask me if my own feedback matches it.
levels.next_step: Use kind honesty on harder, real feedback.
levels.trust_signal: Can explain the skill in their own words with an example.
levels.safety_note: Your balance may differ from others. Honesty plus care is the aim.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: Advice that favors bluntness over care does not count.

levels.mastery_goal: Give honest feedback on work that needs real change.
levels.practice_prompt: Give kind, honest feedback on a real submission that genuinely needs improvement. Reflect on how it was received.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit the kind, honest feedback you gave.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they address real issues honestly?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Did it stay kind while being honest?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Suggest where to apply this again.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Help me deliver honest feedback on work that needs real change, kindly.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I gave honest feedback on weak work. Ask me how the person took it.
levels.next_step: Get ready to coach someone on kind honesty.
levels.trust_signal: Applied the skill in a real situation and reflected on it.
levels.safety_note: If feedback might hurt, slow down and check your tone before sending.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: Avoiding the real issue to keep the peace does not count.

levels.mastery_goal: Help a member soften harsh feedback while keeping honesty.
levels.practice_prompt: Help a member whose feedback comes off harsh. Show them how to keep the honesty but add kindness.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit the coaching feedback you gave another member.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they engage with the member's real feedback?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Could the member improve from it?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Note whether you kept it kind.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Help me coach a member to keep their honesty but add kindness.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I coached someone on kind honesty. Ask me if I practiced what I preached.
levels.next_step: Keep helping members balance honesty and care.
levels.trust_signal: Gave useful feedback that helped another member.
levels.safety_note: Coach the feedback, never shame the person giving it.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: Telling them they were mean, without showing a kinder version, does not count.

skills.description: Offer a clear next step someone can actually take.

levels.mastery_goal: Offer one clear next step.
levels.practice_prompt: On a submission, write one specific next step the person could try, not just what was wrong.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit one actionable next-step suggestion.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they engage with real work?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Could the person actually do it?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Reflect back what made it actionable.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Help me turn a problem I noticed into one clear next step.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I gave a next step. Ask me if the person could actually do it.
levels.next_step: Try giving next steps on a few more submissions.
levels.trust_signal: Completed first practice and submitted proof.
levels.safety_note: A good suggestion gives a path forward, not just a problem.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: Listing what is wrong with no next step does not count.

levels.mastery_goal: Offer actionable suggestions several times.
levels.practice_prompt: On three submissions, include one clear, doable next step each. Note them.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit three actionable suggestions.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they review different work?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Was each step doable?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Point out the most useful step.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Help me practice turning issues into clear next steps.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I gave three next steps. Ask me which was most doable.
levels.next_step: Move toward explaining why next steps matter.
levels.trust_signal: Showed repeated practice across different submissions.
levels.safety_note: Offer steps as options, not commands.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: Three suggestions that are too vague to act on do not count.

levels.mastery_goal: Explain why a next step beats just pointing out problems.
levels.practice_prompt: Write 4-6 sentences on why offering a next step helps more than only naming issues, with an example.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit a short explanation with an example.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they use a real example?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Could a beginner learn from it?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Name the clearest point.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Ask me questions about a time a next step helped someone more than criticism.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I explained why next steps matter. Ask me if a beginner would agree.
levels.next_step: Use actionable suggestions in a full review.
levels.trust_signal: Can explain the skill in their own words with an example.
levels.safety_note: Your view is valid even if simple.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: A definition with no personal example does not count.

levels.mastery_goal: Give complete feedback that ends with a clear next step.
levels.practice_prompt: Give real feedback that names a strength, a concern, and one clear next step. Reflect on how it helped.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit the complete feedback you gave, including a next step.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they give complete, real feedback?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Was the next step clear and doable?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Suggest where to apply this again.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Help me structure feedback that ends with one clear, doable next step.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I gave complete feedback with a next step. Ask me if the person could act on it.
levels.next_step: Get ready to coach someone on actionable suggestions.
levels.trust_signal: Applied the skill in a real situation and reflected on it.
levels.safety_note: One strong next step beats a long list that overwhelms.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: Feedback that ends only with criticism does not count.

levels.mastery_goal: Help a member turn criticism into a next step.
levels.practice_prompt: Help a member who only points out problems. Show them how to add one clear next step.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit the coaching feedback you gave another member.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they engage with the member's real feedback?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Could the member improve from it?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Note whether it was kind and specific.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Help me coach a member to add a clear next step to their feedback.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I coached someone on next steps. Ask me if I was kind and clear.
levels.next_step: Keep helping members give forward-looking feedback.
levels.trust_signal: Gave useful feedback that helped another member.
levels.safety_note: Model an actionable suggestion in your own coaching.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: Telling them to 'be more helpful' without showing how does not count.

directions.description: Learn to capture and share evidence of your growth, honestly and clearly.

skills.description: Show where you started and where you are now.

levels.mastery_goal: Capture one 'before' snapshot.
levels.practice_prompt: Pick a skill or project. Capture or describe its current state as your 'before'.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit a 'before' snapshot (photo, note, or recording).

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they capture a real 'before'?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Could you tell what they will improve?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Encourage them to revisit it later.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Help me decide what to capture as my 'before' for a skill I want to grow.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I captured a 'before'. Ask me how I feel looking at my starting point.
levels.next_step: Keep working, then capture an 'after' later.
levels.trust_signal: Completed first practice and submitted proof.
levels.safety_note: Your starting point is nothing to be ashamed of. Everyone starts somewhere.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: A fake or borrowed 'before' that is not really yours does not count.

levels.mastery_goal: Capture a before and an after.
levels.practice_prompt: After some practice, capture an 'after' to compare with your 'before'. Submit both.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit a before-and-after pair.

feedback_rubric.clarity: Was the change easy to see?
feedback_rubric.effort: Did they capture both points honestly?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Could you tell what improved?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Point out the clearest sign of growth.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Help me plan when to capture my 'after' to show real change.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I have a before and after. Ask me what changed the most.
levels.next_step: Move toward explaining what the change shows.
levels.trust_signal: Showed real change captured over time.
levels.safety_note: Small change is still real change. Compare to your own 'before', not to others.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: An 'after' with no real effort behind the change does not count.

levels.mastery_goal: Explain what your before-and-after shows.
levels.practice_prompt: Write 4-6 sentences explaining what changed between your before and after, and what caused it.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit a short explanation tied to your before-and-after.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they tie it to their real proof?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Could a beginner learn from it?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Name the clearest cause of change.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Ask me questions about what actually caused the change between my before and after.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I explained my before-and-after. Ask me if I gave myself fair credit.
levels.next_step: Use before-and-after on a longer, real project.
levels.trust_signal: Can explain the skill in their own words with an example.
levels.safety_note: Honest credit matters. Name what you did and what helped.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: An explanation that overstates the change does not count.

levels.mastery_goal: Document real progress on a meaningful project.
levels.practice_prompt: On a project that matters to you, capture before and after over time and share what the journey shows.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit a before-and-after with a short progress story.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they document real progress?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Did the proof show genuine growth?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Suggest what to capture next.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Help me plan how to document before and after on a real project.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I documented real progress. Ask me what I am most proud of.
levels.next_step: Get ready to help someone show their progress.
levels.trust_signal: Applied the skill in a real situation and reflected on it.
levels.safety_note: Progress is rarely a straight line. Honest ups and downs are welcome.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: A polished result with no real before to compare does not count.

levels.mastery_goal: Help a member capture their before-and-after.
levels.practice_prompt: Help a member who wants to show progress. Suggest one specific thing they could capture as a 'before'.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit the suggestion you gave another member.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they engage with the member's goal?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Was the idea doable?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Note whether it was encouraging.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Help me suggest a good 'before' for a member who wants to show progress.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I helped someone capture a 'before'. Ask me if my tip was kind and specific.
levels.next_step: Keep helping members document growth.
levels.trust_signal: Gave useful feedback that helped another member.
levels.safety_note: Encourage honest starting points. Remind them everyone begins somewhere.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: Telling them to 'just post something' with no specific idea does not count.

skills.description: Show the steps, not just the final result.

levels.mastery_goal: Capture one step of your process.
levels.practice_prompt: While working on something today, capture one step in the middle (a note, photo, or clip).
levels.proof_requirement: Submit one mid-process capture.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they capture real work in progress?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Could you tell what stage it shows?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Encourage capturing another step.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Help me decide which step of my process is worth capturing.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I captured one step. Ask me what it shows about my work.
levels.next_step: Try capturing a few steps next time.
levels.trust_signal: Completed first practice and submitted proof.
levels.safety_note: Messy middles are normal and worth showing.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: Only capturing a finished result does not count as documenting the process.

levels.mastery_goal: Capture several steps of a process.
levels.practice_prompt: On one project, capture three steps from start toward finish. Submit them in order.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit three in-order process captures.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they capture multiple real steps?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Could you follow the progress?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Point out the most telling step.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Help me plan which steps of a project to capture as I go.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I captured several steps. Ask me what the sequence reveals.
levels.next_step: Move toward explaining why process matters.
levels.trust_signal: Showed repeated practice of documenting steps.
levels.safety_note: You decide what is private. Share only the steps you are comfortable showing.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: Three shots of the same finished result do not count.

levels.mastery_goal: Explain why showing the process builds trust.
levels.practice_prompt: Write 4-6 sentences on why showing your steps matters more than just the result, with an example.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit a short explanation with an example.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they use a real example?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Could a beginner learn from it?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Name the clearest point.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Ask me questions about why showing my process matters.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I explained why process matters. Ask me if a beginner would agree.
levels.next_step: Document the full process of a real project.
levels.trust_signal: Can explain the skill in their own words with an example.
levels.safety_note: Your view is valid even if simple.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: A definition with no personal example does not count.

levels.mastery_goal: Document the full process of a real project.
levels.practice_prompt: On a real project, document the process from start to finish and share what each stage taught you.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit a process record with a short reflection.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they document a real, full project?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Did the record show genuine work?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Suggest what to document next time.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Help me plan how to document a real project from start to finish.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I documented a full process. Ask me which stage taught me the most.
levels.next_step: Get ready to help someone document their process.
levels.trust_signal: Applied the skill in a real situation and reflected on it.
levels.safety_note: Showing struggles in the process is honest and helpful, not a weakness.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: A record that hides all the hard parts does not count.

levels.mastery_goal: Help a member document their process.
levels.practice_prompt: Help a member who only shares results. Suggest one specific step in their process they could capture.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit the suggestion you gave another member.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they engage with the member's work?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Was the idea doable?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Note whether it was encouraging.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Help me suggest one process step a member could start capturing.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I helped someone document process. Ask me if my tip was kind and specific.
levels.next_step: Keep helping members show their work.
levels.trust_signal: Gave useful feedback that helped another member.
levels.safety_note: Encourage honest sharing, and respect what they want to keep private.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: Telling them to 'show more' with no specific idea does not count.

skills.description: Share honest small progress without overstating it.

levels.mastery_goal: Share one honest small win.
levels.practice_prompt: Share one small thing you accomplished today, honestly and simply.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit one small win you are sharing.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they share something real?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Was it honest, not overstated?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Celebrate the win with them.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Help me notice one small win from today worth sharing.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I shared a small win. Ask me if it felt good to name it.
levels.next_step: Try sharing small wins a few more times.
levels.trust_signal: Completed first practice and submitted proof.
levels.safety_note: Small wins are worth sharing. You do not need a big result to belong here.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: Overstating a win or claiming something you did not do does not count.

levels.mastery_goal: Share small wins across several days.
levels.practice_prompt: Share an honest small win on several days. Keep them together.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit small wins from several days.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they share across multiple days?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Were they honest and real?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Point out a win worth celebrating.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Help me build a habit of noticing one small win each day.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I shared wins for several days. Ask me what I notice about my progress.
levels.next_step: Move toward explaining why small wins matter.
levels.trust_signal: Showed repeated practice across multiple days.
levels.safety_note: A quiet day with no win is okay too. Honesty matters most.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: Inflating small things into big claims does not count.

levels.mastery_goal: Explain why honest small wins matter.
levels.practice_prompt: Write 4-6 sentences on why sharing small, honest wins helps you and others, with an example.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit a short explanation with an example.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they use a real example?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Could a beginner learn from it?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Name the clearest point.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Ask me questions about how sharing small wins has helped me keep going.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I explained why small wins matter. Ask me if it feels true.
levels.next_step: Share wins as part of a real progress story.
levels.trust_signal: Can explain the skill in their own words with an example.
levels.safety_note: Your wins are yours. Compare only to your own past.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: A definition with no personal example does not count.

levels.mastery_goal: Use small wins to keep a real effort going.
levels.practice_prompt: Over two weeks on a real goal, share honest small wins along the way. Reflect on how it affected your momentum.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit a series of small wins with a short reflection.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they share over real time?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Did the wins support their momentum?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Suggest a win to look for next.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Help me notice small wins to share while working on a real goal.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I shared wins over time. Ask me if they helped me keep going.
levels.next_step: Get ready to help someone notice their wins.
levels.trust_signal: Applied the skill in a real situation and reflected on it.
levels.safety_note: Momentum is personal. Share at a pace that feels right for you.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: A reflection with no real wins behind it does not count.

levels.mastery_goal: Help a member notice and share a small win.
levels.practice_prompt: Reply to a member who feels they are not progressing. Help them notice one honest small win.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit the encouraging reply you gave another member.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they engage with the person's real situation?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Did it help them see a real win?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Note whether it was warm and honest.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Help me point out a real small win to a member who feels stuck.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I helped someone notice a win. Ask me if it was honest and kind.
levels.next_step: Keep helping members see their progress.
levels.trust_signal: Gave useful feedback that helped another member.
levels.safety_note: Point out real wins, not invented ones. Honesty keeps encouragement meaningful.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: Empty hype with no real win named does not count as helping.

skills.description: Look back over time to see and name how far you have come.

levels.mastery_goal: Name one way you have grown.
levels.practice_prompt: Think back a few weeks. Write one way you have grown since then.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit one note naming a real way you have grown.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they reflect honestly?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Was it a real, specific change?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Reflect back the growth they named.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Help me look back a few weeks and name one way I have grown.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I named one way I grew. Ask me if I had noticed it before.
levels.next_step: Try reflecting on growth again next month.
levels.trust_signal: Completed first practice and submitted proof.
levels.safety_note: Even small growth counts. Give yourself honest credit.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: Claiming growth with no real change behind it does not count.

levels.mastery_goal: Reflect on growth more than once over time.
levels.practice_prompt: On two occasions a couple of weeks apart, note how you have grown. Compare them.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit two growth reflections from different times.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they reflect at different times?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Did they capture real change?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Point out the clearest growth.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Help me set up a way to reflect on my growth every couple of weeks.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I reflected on growth twice. Ask me what changed between them.
levels.next_step: Move toward explaining how reflecting on growth helps.
levels.trust_signal: Showed repeated reflection over real time.
levels.safety_note: Growth is uneven. Slow stretches are normal and still count.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: Two identical reflections with no real comparison do not count.

levels.mastery_goal: Explain how reflecting on growth supports progress.
levels.practice_prompt: Write 4-6 sentences on how looking back at your growth helps you move forward, with an example.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit a short explanation with an example.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they use a real example?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Could a beginner learn from it?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Name the clearest insight.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Ask me questions about how reflecting on growth has helped me keep going.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I explained how reflecting on growth helps. Ask me if it feels true.
levels.next_step: Use growth reflection to set a real next goal.
levels.trust_signal: Can explain the skill in their own words with an example.
levels.safety_note: AI can help you reflect, but your sense of your own growth is yours to decide.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: A definition with no personal example does not count.

levels.mastery_goal: Use a growth reflection to set your next goal.
levels.practice_prompt: Reflect on your growth over the past month, then set a real next goal based on what you see. Share both.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit a growth reflection plus the next goal it led to.

feedback_rubric.clarity: Could you follow the reflection and goal?
feedback_rubric.effort: Did they reflect on real growth?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Did the goal follow from the reflection?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Suggest how to track the new goal.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Help me turn a reflection on my growth into one clear next goal.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I set a goal from my growth reflection. Ask me if it fits where I am now.
levels.next_step: Get ready to help someone reflect on their growth.
levels.trust_signal: Applied the skill in a real situation and reflected on it.
levels.safety_note: Let the goal come from you. AI can prompt, but the direction is your call.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: A goal unrelated to the reflection, or no real reflection, does not count.

levels.mastery_goal: Help a member see their own growth.
levels.practice_prompt: Reply to a member who feels they have not grown. Help them notice one real way they have, based on their shared work.
levels.proof_requirement: Submit the reflective reply you gave another member.

feedback_rubric.effort: Did they engage with the member's real work?
feedback_rubric.usefulness: Did it help them see real growth?
feedback_rubric.next_step: Note whether it was warm and honest.

levels.ai_prep_prompt: Help me point out a real way a member has grown, based on their work.
levels.ai_reflection_prompt: I helped someone see their growth. Ask me if it was honest and kind.
levels.next_step: Keep helping members recognize their progress.
levels.trust_signal: Gave useful feedback that helped another member.
levels.safety_note: Point to real evidence of growth, and let them own how it feels.
levels.does_not_count_as_mastery: Generic 'you've grown so much' with no real evidence does not count.
